image0.name: step_3_learning_curves_1_1776948522.png
image0.caption: Smoothed episode return versus environment steps for a standard PPO critic (Condition A) and a critic structured with a Lyapunov prior (Condition B). Curves show the mean ± one standard deviation over five random seeds, with individual seed trajectories overlaid. Both conditions exhibit nearly identical learning trajectories, improving initially before plateauing at a similar negative return value. This suggests that the structural prior in the value function did not lead to a discernible improvement in policy learning speed or final performance within the 100,000-step training horizon.
